description:
Join us on Wednesday, July 1, from 4-7 PM at Whispering Vine South Creek for a Belle Glos tasting featuring four California Pinot Noirs: Clark & Telephone, Las Alturas, Dairyman and Balade.

Tasting Fee: $35 per person (Buy a tasting bottle and your fee is refunded.)

Featured Wines:

  • Belle Glos Clark & Telephone Vineyard Pinot Noir 2024 - Santa Maria Valley Pinot Noir with cranberry, raspberry jam, cedar, clove and a warm, structured finish.
  • Belle Glos Las Alturas Vineyard Pinot Noir 2023 - Santa Lucia Highlands Pinot Noir with bing cherry, dried fig, cassis, dark chocolate and mouthwatering acidity.
  • Belle Glos Dairyman Vineyard Pinot Noir 2024 - Russian River Valley Pinot Noir with dark chocolate, black cherry, blackberry pie, cedar and refined tannins.
  • Belle Glos Balade Pinot Noir 2023 - Santa Rita Hills Pinot Noir with blackberry, sage, cherry, dark chocolate, boysenberry and a long finish.

Come taste through Belle Glos and find your favorite bottle. Buy a tasting bottle and your fee is refunded.
title: Belle Glos Tasting
